text:
AI & Data Transformation  
Case Study: Large British Building Society  
Strategic Partnership for AI Enablement,  
Modern Data Platform Migration & Data Governance  
Confidential  
Executive Summary  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
This case study documents a comprehensive AI and Data transformation programme spanning three strategic pillars:  
AI Centre of Excellence  
- Established GenAI CoE
- Experimented with 4+ use cases
- ~90% time savings on complaints letters
- Graduated use cases to production  
Modern Data Platform  
- Azure + Databricks + dbt
- MS SQL & Teradata migration
- Customer data mastering
- >30% faster code development via GenAI  
Data Governance  
- 205 CDEs traced end-to-end
- 400+ DQ rules operationalised
- 78 systems mapped
- Reconciliation controls defined  
The programme has delivered measurable business impact across all three pillars, reducing costs, improving compliance, and building a scalable foundation for AI-driven innovation.  
1. AI Centre of Excellence  
Setup, Experimentation & Production Use Cases  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
AI CoE – Problem Context  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly, govern AI deployments, and scale proven use cases into production.  
Without a coordinated approach, there was a risk of fragmented AI initiatives, inconsistent quality standards, and inability to demonstrate measurable business value from AI investments.  
CoE Foundations (Q4 2023)  
Leadership  
- Clear accountability
- Delivery governance  
Team  
- Cross-functional
- Shaped & mobilised  
Processes  
- Standardised delivery
- Central collaboration  
Governance  
- Operational model
- Responsible AI  
AI CoE – Use Cases Delivered  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Use Case 1: Complaints Letter Writing (CRAiG)  
- 1,300 bespoke letters/week, 40 mins each manually
- GenAI drafts letter, human reviews in <5 mins
- REACT-based prompts outperformed few-shot
- PII redaction, model monitoring, threat modelling
- Piloted Feb–Sep 2024, graduated to production  
Use Case 2: Call Transcript Analytics  
- Sensitive data redaction via Azure Language AI
- Automated call summarisation
- Root cause & areas-of-interest extraction
- Nuanced sentiment beyond NLP/ML
- Emotion detection with detailed reasoning  
Use Case 3: QA/QC AI Assist  
- Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled
- Step-change in quality assurance coverage
- Automated compliance checking  
Scaling the Pipeline  
- Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot
- Contracts analysis PoC & pilot
- Figma-to-React code conversion
- GenAI Platform Federation with API Management  
AI CoE – Key Metrics & Benefits  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
~90%  
Reduction in letter  
drafting time  
4 / 5  
Avg. accuracy &  
relevancy score  
100%  
Call screening  
coverage  
Key Benefits  
- Scalable AI platform with federated governance, API management and model monitoring
- Pipeline of 10+ use cases across Customer, Colleague and IT Operations domains
- Responsible AI practices embedded from inception: threat modelling, PII redaction, model risk evaluation
- Integration roadmap with Lakehouse, solution accelerators, agentic workflows and small language models  
2. Modern Data Platform Migration  
Azure, Databricks & dbt  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Modern Data Platform – Problem Context  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
The organisation operated a fragmented legacy data landscape comprising MS SQL-based data warehouses, Teradata-based data marts, and mainframe-hosted Customer Information Systems (CIS). This created significant technical debt, high infrastructure costs, limited data accessibility, and constrained advanced analytics.  
Legacy Systems in Scope  
MS SQL / Mainframe CIS  
- Customer Information Systems on Unisys mainframe
- Multiple data warehouses & marts
- Manual, siloed data processes  
Teradata Vantage  
- Enterprise data warehouses
- Complex stored procedures
- High licensing costs  
Customer Data  
- Fragmented across CIS, SAP and operational systems
- Limited mastering capability
- Inconsistent data delivery  
2.1 MS SQL & Mainframe CIS Migration  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Solution  
- Migrated mainframe CIS to modern data lakehouse on Azure
- Modular, reusable, version-controlled dbt models
- Medallion architecture: Bronze/L0 and Gold/L2 layers
- Performance-optimised ETL aligned with lakehouse principles
- Orchestration via Azure Data Factory & Control-M
- Rigorous DQ through testing and validation in dbt
- Standardised extracts (CSV, TXT) for business consumers  
Benefits  
- Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems, significantly lowering infrastructure costs
- Cloud-native architecture improving data accessibility & agility
- Centralised, well-governed pipelines ensuring regulatory compliance
- Scalable foundation for real-time processing, ML & AI initiatives
- Freed budget for innovation and modernisation  
Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP  
2.2 Teradata Data Warehouse Migration  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Solution  
- Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure
- Target completion: Q1 FY 2026–27 (June 2026)
- SME-led evaluation of migration strategy & architecture
- Collaborative workshops in Pune with client stakeholders
- GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt conversion
- PoC on complex data mart codebase validating accelerated approach
- Medallion Architecture Bronze milestone delivered ahead of schedule  
>30%  
Reduction in code  
build & test  
- Fast-tracked delivery against stringent timelines
- Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value
- Upfront architectural design for future readiness  
2.3 Customer Data, Mastering & Analytics  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Solution  
- Customer data feeds migrated from legacy CIS to SAP and Azure lakehouse
- Centralised data pipelines with built-in validation and auditing
- End-to-end data delivery for business consumers & external systems
- Foundation for self-service BI and advanced customer analytics  
Benefits  
- Single, authoritative view of customer data across the organisation
- Faster, more flexible access improving decision-making
- Higher data accuracy and consistency for regulatory compliance
- Enablement of advanced customer analytics, segmentation & personalisation  
3. Data Governance  
Data Lineage & Reconciliation Controls  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Data Governance – Problem Context  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
The legacy data estate lacked visibility into how Critical Data Elements (CDEs) flowed across 78+ systems and 6 functional areas, creating significant compliance risk and data quality gaps.  
Specific challenges existed in Eco Crime and Payments Screening, where the inability to trace data lineage end-to-end posed regulatory and operational risks.  
The organisation needed to:
name: Chunk 1/2

relationships.description: The CoE provides the centralised structure and governance model needed to responsibly govern and scale AI.
relationships.context: The organisation recognised the transformative potential of Generative AI but lacked a centralised structure to experiment responsibly... CoE Foundations (Q4 2023) ... Established GenAI CoE

relationships.description: The AI CoE was formally established and operationalised during the Q4 2023 setup event.
relationships.context: CoE Foundations (Q4 2023) ... Established GenAI CoE

relationships.description: The CoE delivers a GenAI-powered solution to automate and accelerate the drafting of complaints letters.
relationships.context: Use Case 1: Complaints Letter Writing (CRAiG) ... GenAI drafts letter, human reviews in <5 mins

relationships.description: The CoE enables automated summarisation, root cause extraction, and sentiment analysis from call transcripts.
relationships.context: Use Case 2: Call Transcript Analytics ... Automated call summarisation ... Nuanced sentiment beyond NLP/ML

relationships.description: The CoE scales call screening coverage from manual sampling to full GenAI-enabled automated screening.
relationships.context: Use Case 3: QA/QC AI Assist ... Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled

relationships.description: The CoE pilots advanced fraud detection capabilities using GenAI techniques.
relationships.context: Scaling the Pipeline - Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot

relationships.description: The CRAiG use case directly generates a ~90% reduction in the time required to draft complaints letters.
relationships.context: ~90% time savings on complaints letters ... 1,300 bespoke letters/week, 40 mins each manually

relationships.description: The QA/QC AI Assist use case achieves full automated screening coverage, replacing manual sampling.
relationships.context: Scaled call screening from 5% manual to 100% GenAI-enabled ... Step-change in quality assurance coverage

relationships.description: The CoE embeds responsible AI practices including threat modelling, PII redaction, and model risk evaluation.
relationships.context: Responsible AI practices embedded from inception: threat modelling, PII redaction, model risk evaluation

relationships.description: Responsible AI governance capabilities enable safe and compliant deployment of the CRAiG use case.
relationships.context: PII redaction, model monitoring, threat modelling ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024, graduated to production

relationships.description: The modern data platform is architected and deployed on the Azure cloud infrastructure.
relationships.context: Modern Data Platform - Azure, Databricks & dbt ... Migrated mainframe CIS to modern data lakehouse on Azure

relationships.description: The platform consolidates data assets and leverages Databricks for unified data analytics and engineering.
relationships.context: Azure + Databricks + dbt ... Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure

relationships.description: The platform utilises dbt for modular, reusable, version-controlled data transformation models.
relationships.context: Azure + Databricks + dbt ... Modular, reusable, version-controlled dbt models ... Rigorous DQ through testing and validation in dbt

relationships.description: The modern platform consolidates and replaces legacy Teradata Vantage data warehouse assets.
relationships.context: MS SQL & Teradata migration ... Consolidating all data assets from Teradata Vantage to Databricks on Azure

relationships.description: The platform decommissions legacy Unisys mainframe systems and migrates customer data to the cloud.
relationships.context: Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems ... Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP

relationships.description: The platform delivers customer data mastering capabilities to create a single authoritative view.
relationships.context: Customer data mastering ... Single, authoritative view of customer data across the organisation

relationships.description: The modern data platform accelerates code build and test cycles by over 30% using GenAI techniques.
relationships.context: >30% faster code development via GenAI ... >30% Reduction in code build & test ... Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value

relationships.description: The platform reduces infrastructure costs by decommissioning legacy systems and moving to cloud-native architecture.
relationships.context: Decommissioning of legacy mainframe systems, significantly lowering infrastructure costs ... Freed budget for innovation and modernisation

relationships.description: The platform migrates customer data feeds and integrates with SAP systems for downstream consumption.
relationships.context: Ending Unisys reliance – migrating customer data and FC/RC feeds to SAP ... Customer data feeds migrated from legacy CIS to SAP and Azure lakehouse

relationships.description: The CoE is characterised by a federated governance model that balances central oversight with distributed delivery.
relationships.context: Scalable AI platform with federated governance, API management and model monitoring

relationships.description: The platform leverages GitHub Copilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt code conversion and development.
relationships.context: GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot to accelerate Teradata-to-dbt conversion

relationships.description: The accelerated migration approach is validated through a PoC on complex data mart codebases.
relationships.context: PoC on complex data mart codebase validating accelerated approach ... Validated GenAI-accelerated approach for time-to-value

relationships.description: The programme includes data lineage tracing and reconciliation controls to ensure compliance and quality.
relationships.context: Data Governance - Data Lineage & Reconciliation Controls ... 205 CDEs traced end-to-end ... 78 systems mapped

relationships.description: The capability resolves the visibility gap by tracing CDEs end-to-end across 78+ systems.
relationships.context: The legacy data estate lacked visibility into how Critical Data Elements (CDEs) flowed across 78+ systems ... 205 CDEs traced end-to-end

relationships.description: The client conducts collaborative workshops and stakeholder engagements in Pune.
relationships.context: Collaborative workshops in Pune with client stakeholders

relationships.description: The fraud analysis use case was piloted and evaluated during the Feb–Sep 2024 pilot event.
relationships.context: Fraud Analysis PoC & pilot ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024

relationships.description: The CoE delivers the ~90% reduction in letter drafting time through the CRAiG use case.
relationships.context: ~90% time savings on complaints letters ... Graduated use cases to production

relationships.description: The overall programme delivers measurable cost reductions across all three strategic pillars.
relationships.context: The programme has delivered measurable business impact across all three pillars, reducing costs, improving compliance, and building a scalable foundation for AI-driven innovation.

relationships.description: Data mastering capabilities accelerate code development and testing cycles through automated pipelines.
relationships.context: Customer data mastering ... Centralised data pipelines with built-in validation and auditing ... >30% faster code development via GenAI

relationships.description: The call transcript analytics use case leverages Azure Language AI for sensitive data redaction.
relationships.context: Sensitive data redaction via Azure Language AI ... Automated call summarisation

relationships.description: The modern data platform migration and GenAI acceleration approach were piloted during the Feb–Sep 2024 event.
relationships.context: PoC on complex data mart codebase validating accelerated approach ... Medallion Architecture Bronze milestone delivered ahead of schedule ... Piloted Feb–Sep 2024
